testsuite.name: es.frapaego.spring.h2.infrastructure.outbound.db.repository.SpringDataPriceRepositoryTest

testcase.name: findByStartDateAndProductIdAndBrandId returns correct PriceDAO for valid params
findByStartDateAndProductIdAndBrandId returns null for non-existing params
